title: Remillium
description: Adds a few items into the game, and a material stronger than netherite
body:
Adds a few new materials, such as florium ingot and reinforced florium ingot, as well as its respective tools and armors.

Upgrade using a smithing Table:
Florium Tool/Armor + Reinforced Florium = Reinforced Florium Tool/Armor

Made with MCreator 2023.3-2025.1
